title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 128.459
text:
*128.459.  Graphical map representation of congressional district boundaries to be published. — Upon passage and enactment of sections 128.451 to 128.458 and as provided to the Revisor of Statutes, the revisor of statutes shall publish the graphical map representation of the official congressional district boundaries as an appendix of the Revised Statutes of Missouri.
(L. 2011 H.B. 193 § B) 
*Effective 6-03-11, see § 21.250.  H.B. 193 was vetoed on April 30, 2011.  The veto was overridden on May 4, 2011. 
See Appendix I for map provided to Revisor on 8-2-2011.
